2.name: Fighting Style
2.description: You adopt a specialised fighting technique. Choose Defence (+1 AC in armour), Duelling (+2 damage with a one-handed weapon), or Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice).

details.effect: +1 AC, or +2 damage, or reroll low damage dice

3.name: Improved Critical
3.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20, not just 20.

details.effect: Critical on 19–20

4.name: Extra Attack
4.description: When you take the Attack action, you can attack twice instead of once.

details.effect: Two attacks per Attack action

5.name: Indomitable
5.description: When you fail a saving throw you may reroll it, keeping the new result.

6.name: Tactical Prowess
6.description: As a bonus action, you call out a target and grant one ally within 30 ft an immediate reaction attack or 15 ft of movement against that target.

7.name: War Caster Resilience
7.description: You have advantage on CON saving throws to maintain concentration and can perform somatic components even with weapons in hand.

8.name: Relentless Endurance
8.description: When you are reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 HP instead.

9.name: Sweeping Attack
9.description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack, choose a second creature within 5 ft. It takes weapon damage equal to your STR modifier (no attack roll needed).

10.name: Champion's Resolve
10.description: You are immune to the frightened condition. Allies within 30 ft of you have advantage on saving throws against fear and charm effects.

11.name: Three Attacks
11.description: Your martial training reaches a new apex, granting you a third strike with every flurry of blows. Few enemies can withstand this relentless pressure.

details.effect: Three attacks per Attack action

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Countless hours of rigorous training sharpen your body and mind to a razor's edge.

details.effect: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each (max 20)

13.name: Indomitable (Two Uses)
13.description: Your iron will refuses to yield to magical compulsion or debilitating effects — twice per rest.

details.effect: Reroll a failed saving throw

14.name: Supreme Warrior
14.description: You read an opponent's next move before they make it, turning their momentum against them.

details.effect: When a creature misses you with a melee attack, make one melee weapon attack against it

15.name: Relentless Body
15.description: Your body has been tempered through countless battles into something approaching the mythic. Wounds that would kill ordinary soldiers barely slow you.

details.effect: Resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing. HP max increases by 30.

16.name: Martial Versatility
16.description: You have fought with every weapon style imaginable and can switch between them mid-combat with fluid grace.

details.effect: Change your Fighting Style to any other option until your next short rest

17.name: Four Attacks
17.description: You are a living engine of destruction. Your strikes come in a blur of steel that most combatants cannot even perceive.

details.effect: Four attacks per Attack action

18.name: Indomitable (Three Uses)
18.description: Your will is legendary — pain, magic, and fear have no dominion over you.

details.effect: Reroll a failed saving throw

19.name: Survivor
19.description: At the start of each turn, you regain hit points equal to 5 + your CON modifier if you have no more than half your HP left.

details.effect: Regenerate 5 + CON modifier HP per turn when below half HP

20.name: Legendary Champion
20.description: Songs are sung of your deeds, and enemies falter at the mere sight of you. Your prowess transcends mortal limits.

details.effect: +4 to STR or DEX (max 24). Once per turn on hit, force DC 18 STR save or target knocked prone and stunned.

21.name: Martial Apex
21.description: You have mastered every weapon, every stance, every technique. Your attacks carry supernatural force.

details.effect: Weapon attacks count as magical and deal +2d6 force damage. +3 to attack and damage rolls.

22.name: Undying Fury
22.description: When death reaches for you, your warrior's spirit throws it back. You refuse to fall while enemies still stand.

details.effect: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead and gain advantage on all attacks until end of next turn.

23.name: Warlord's Presence
23.description: Your battlefield presence warps the flow of combat. Allies fight harder under your command.

details.effect: Up to 5 allies within 60 ft gain advantage on attacks and saves until start of your next turn.

24.name: Avatar of War
24.description: You are war itself given form. Weapons gleam brighter in your hands and the ground shakes with your advance.

details.effect: For 1 minute: speed doubles, can't be grappled or restrained, deal max damage on all attacks.

25.name: Five Attacks
25.description: At the pinnacle of martial mastery, you strike with blinding speed. Each exchange of blows is a masterclass in destruction.

details.effect: Five attacks per Attack action. On a critical hit, target must succeed DC 20 CON save or be stunned.

2.name: Arcane Recovery
2.description: Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can recover expended spell slots whose combined level is equal to or less than half your Wizard level (rounded up).

details.effect: Recover spell slots totalling half level

3.name: Sculpt Spells
3.description: When you cast an evocation spell that affects other creatures, you can choose up to 1 + spell level creatures. Those creatures automatically succeed on their saving throw and take no damage.

4.name: Potent Cantrip
4.description: Your damaging cantrips force a creature to take half damage even on a successful saving throw.

details.effect: Cantrip saves deal half on success

5.name: Fireball
5.description: A bright streak flashes to a point you choose within 150 ft and blossoms into a roiling ball of flame. Each creature in a 20-ft radius must make a DEX save or take 8d6 fire damage (half on success).

6.name: Counterspell
6.description: As a reaction, you attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the spell is 3rd level or lower it automatically fails. For higher levels make an Arcana check (DC 10 + spell level).

7.name: Spell Mastery
7.description: Choose one 1st-level spell and one 2nd-level spell. You can cast them at their lowest level without expending a spell slot.

details.effect: Two spells cast for free per day

8.name: Empowered Evocation
8.description: Whenever you cast an evocation spell, you can add your INT modifier to one damage roll of that spell.

details.effect: +INT modifier to evocation damage

9.name: Overchannel
9.description: Maximise the damage of a 1st-through-5th level damaging spell. Spells above 1st level deal 2d12 necrotic to you per level above 1st (no save).

details.effect: Max damage; self-damage for level 2+

10.name: Arcane Perfection
10.description: Your concentration can no longer be broken by taking damage. You also have advantage on all Intelligence-based checks and saving throws.

11.name: Arcane Supremacy
11.description: Your mastery of the arcane allows you to push beyond normal limits. You gain access to 6th-level spell slots.

details.effect: Access to 6th-level spell slots. Add two 6th-level spells to your spellbook.

12.name: Arcane Resilience
12.description: Years of studying dangerous magical forces have suffused your body with protective arcane energy.

details.effect: Proficiency in CON saves. +2 to one ability score (max 20).

13.name: Seventh Circle
13.description: You breach the seventh circle of arcane power, unlocking spells that bend reality and challenge nature.

details.effect: Access to 7th-level spell slots. Add two 7th-level spells to your spellbook.

14.name: Arcane Tradition Mastery
14.description: Your chosen school of magic reaches its fullest expression, granting a devastating technique unique to your specialty.

details.effect: Gain your Arcane Tradition's 14th-level feature. Spell save DC increases by 1.

15.name: Eighth Circle
15.description: You wield spells of near-divine power, reshaping reality with words and gestures that would shatter a lesser mind.

details.effect: Access to 8th-level spell slots. Add two 8th-level spells to your spellbook.

16.name: Spell Resistance
16.description: Your constant exposure to arcane forces has made you resistant to hostile magic.

details.effect: Advantage on saves against spells. Resistance to damage from spells.

17.name: Ninth Circle
17.description: You stand at the apex of mortal spellcraft. Few beings in existence can match your command of the arcane.

details.effect: Access to 9th-level spell slots including Wish.

18.name: Spell Mastery (Improved)
18.description: Two spells are so deeply etched into your mind that you no longer need a slot to cast them.

details.effect: Choose one 1st-level and one 2nd-level spell — cast at lowest level without a spell slot.

19.name: Signature Spells
19.description: Two spells define your legend. You always have them prepared and can cast each once per short rest at 5th level for free.

details.effect: Two 3rd-level-or-lower spells always prepared, cast free once per short rest at 5th level.

20.name: Arcane Transcendence
20.description: You have pressed beyond the boundaries of mortal magic into territory that borders on the divine.

details.effect: Gain a 10th-level slot (upcast 9th-level: max damage dice, targets have disadvantage on saves).

21.name: Reality Anchor
21.description: Your mastery is so complete that you can lock down the magical fabric around you.

details.effect: For 1 minute, spells can't be countered and concentration can't be broken by damage.

22.name: Arcane Dominion
22.description: You seize control of magical effects and turn enemy spellcasters into liabilities.

details.effect: Target a concentration spell within 120 ft. Caster makes INT save or you steal control for 1 min.

23.name: Time Dilation
23.description: You bend the flow of time, slipping between moments to act with impossible frequency.

details.effect: Cast Time Stop; cast one 5th-level-or-lower spell for free during each extra turn.

24.name: Weave Manipulation
24.description: You feel the very threads of the Weave and alter how magic functions in your presence.

details.effect: Allied spellcasters within 30 ft gain +2 spell save DC. Enemy casters within 30 ft suffer -2.

25.name: Archmagus
25.description: You are a living fulcrum of arcane power. The universe bends toward your intentions.

details.effect: INT increases to 26. Wish never causes stress. Once per day, cast any known spell without slot, components, or concentration.

2.name: Channel Divinity
2.description: Channel raw divine energy to Turn Undead (forcing them to flee) or invoke your deity's domain power. Undead of CR ½ or lower that fail the save are destroyed.

details.effect: Turn or destroy undead; trigger domain power

3.name: Divine Strike
3.description: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon attack, you can cause the weapon to deal an extra 1d8 damage of a type granted by your deity.

4.name: Spiritual Weapon
4.description: As a bonus action, create a floating spectral weapon within 60 ft that lasts 1 minute. On each of your turns you can make a melee attack with it (1d8 + WIS modifier force damage, 20 ft reach).

details.usage: Bonus action to summon and attack

5.name: Potent Spellcasting
5.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

details.effect: +WIS to cantrip damage

6.name: Blessed Healer
6.description: When you cast a healing spell that restores HP to a creature other than yourself, you regain 2 + the spell's level in HP.

details.effect: Regain 2 + spell level HP

7.name: Divine Intervention
7.description: Implore your deity to intervene directly. Roll d100; if you roll equal to or less than your Cleric level, the deity acts. On success you can't use this feature again for 7 days.

details.effect: % chance = Cleric level

8.name: Holy Aura
8.description: Allies within 30 ft gain +2 AC and advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects. Any fiend or undead that hits an ally in the aura takes 2d6 radiant damage.

9.name: Supreme Healing
9.description: When you would normally roll dice to restore HP with a spell, you instead use the highest number possible for each die.

details.effect: All healing spells deal maximum HP

10.name: Avatar of Divinity
10.description: For 1 minute, you radiate divine power: you are immune to one damage type of your choice (chosen when you use this), and allies within 10 ft regain 1d6 HP at the start of their turn.

11.name: Divine Intervention (Improved)
11.description: Your deity answers your prayers with absolute certainty — your faith has grown strong enough to move the heavens.

details.effect: Divine Intervention automatically succeeds. The deity acts in a manner befitting your domain.

12.name: Holy Radiance
12.description: Your divine presence blazes like a second sun. Undead and fiends recoil from the holiness pouring from you.

details.effect: Emit bright light in 30 ft for 1 min. Undead/fiends take 4d8 radiant and must WIS save or be frightened.

13.name: Blessed Fortitude
13.description: Your god's hand rests upon you, turning aside death and suffering that would destroy any other servant.

details.effect: Advantage on death saves. Regain 1d10 + WIS HP at start of turn when at 0 HP.

14.name: Mass Restoration
14.description: With a single prayer, you flood your allies with healing energy that washes away wounds and curses.

details.effect: All allies within 60 ft regain 10d6 + WIS HP. All conditions removed.

15.name: Divine Domain Pinnacle
15.description: Your domain's gifts reach their fullest expression, channeling your deity's core essence.

details.effect: Channel Divinity DC increases by 2. Gain your domain's pinnacle feature.

16.name: Aura of the Divine
16.description: You emanate a constant field of protective holiness that shields those around you.

details.effect: Allies within 30 ft have advantage on saves vs. spells and magical effects.

17.name: Holy Nimbus
17.description: You are wreathed in blinding holy light that burns evil creatures who dare approach.

details.effect: 30 ft bright light for 1 min. Enemies take 10 radiant/turn. Undead/fiends have disadvantage on attacks.

18.name: Miracle Worker
18.description: Your prayers can replicate any cleric spell at maximum power, channeling raw divine energy.

details.effect: Cast any cleric spell of 9th level or lower without a slot. All dice maximized.

19.name: Resurrection Aura
19.description: Death cannot claim those in your care. The dying cling to life in your presence.

details.effect: Allies within 30 ft who drop to 0 HP drop to 1 HP instead (once per ally per short rest). Cast Raise Dead free 1/long rest.

20.name: Avatar of the Divine
20.description: Your god briefly inhabits your mortal form, transforming you into a weapon of wrath and mercy.

details.effect: For 1 min: 60-ft fly speed, spell save DC +4, bonus action 6d10 radiant to any visible creature.

21.name: Holy Judgment
21.description: Your prayers call down divine fire with terrifying precision upon the wicked.

details.effect: Up to 3 creatures within 120 ft take 10d10 radiant and are blinded 1 min (CON save halves, negates blind). Undead/fiends auto-fail.

22.name: Wrath of Heaven
22.description: The sky darkens, the earth trembles, and enemies of the faith are consumed by divine fire.

details.effect: Allies in area regain 8d10 HP.

23.name: Eternal Covenant
23.description: Your connection to your deity transcends the mortal plane. You commune at will and receive direct guidance.

details.effect: Cast Commune at will. Deity warns of danger within 1 mile. Immune to charm, fear, and possession.

24.name: Divine Shield
24.description: An impenetrable shield of divine energy surrounds you and your allies in the darkest hours.

details.effect: You and all allies within 30 ft gain immunity to all damage for 1 round.

25.name: Hand of God
25.description: You are the living will of your deity made manifest. You do not serve the divine — you are its instrument.

details.effect: Permanently blessed (as Bless, no concentration). Once per day, target a creature within 60 ft — reduced to 0 HP (no save). Fails vs. legendary creatures or deities.

2.name: Uncanny Dodge
2.description: When an attacker you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.

3.name: Evasion
3.description: When you are subjected to a DEX save for half damage, you instead take no damage on success and half damage on failure.

details.effect: No damage on successful DEX save

4.name: Reliable Talent
4.description: Whenever you make an ability check that lets you add your proficiency bonus, treat a d20 result of 9 or lower as a 10.

details.effect: Minimum 10 on proficient skill checks

5.name: Assassinate
5.description: During the first round of combat you have advantage on attack rolls against any creature that has not yet acted. Any hit against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

details.effect: Advantage + auto-crit on surprised targets

6.name: Use Magic Device
6.description: You can use any magic item regardless of class, race, or level requirements.

7.name: Shadow Step
7.description: As a bonus action while in dim light or darkness, teleport up to 60 ft to an unoccupied space also in dim light or darkness. You have advantage on the first melee attack you make before the end of the turn.

8.name: Elusive
8.description: No attack roll ever has advantage against you while you are not incapacitated.

9.name: Death Strike
9.description: When you hit a surprised creature with a Sneak Attack, it must make a CON save (DC 8 + DEX mod + proficiency). On a failure, double all the damage of the attack.

details.usage: On Sneak Attack vs. surprised target
details.effect: Potential double damage

10.name: Stroke of Luck
10.description: Turn one failed ability check into a success, or change a missed attack roll into a hit (your choice).

11.name: Reliable Talent (Improved)
11.description: Your trained skills perform at impossible consistency. There is no margin for error in your craft.

details.effect: On proficient ability checks, treat any roll below 15 as 15. Double proficiency on one additional skill.

12.name: Blindsense
12.description: Your senses are honed to the point where sight is almost redundant. You feel heat, air displacement, and vibrations.

details.effect: Know the location of hidden/invisible creatures within 10 ft. Cannot be surprised.

13.name: Slippery Mind
13.description: Your will is a locked room with no door. You resist every charm and compulsion.

details.effect: Proficiency in WIS saves. If already proficient, gain proficiency in CHA saves.

14.name: Sneak Attack (Improved)
14.description: Your precision strikes deal devastating damage. You know every weak point, every gap in armor.

details.effect: Sneak Attack increases to 7d6. Critical Sneak Attacks also blind the target until end of its next turn.

15.name: Shadow Meld
15.description: You step into dim light and simply cease to exist as far as mundane senses are concerned.

details.effect: While in dim light or darkness, become invisible until you attack or leave darkness. Not pierced by darkvision.

16.name: Master Thief
16.description: No lock, trap, or magical ward can keep you out. Your fingers have supernatural sensitivity.

details.effect: +10 to Thieves' Tools checks. Can disarm magical traps. Auto-detect traps within 30 ft.

17.name: Sneak Attack (Greater)
17.description: Your roguish archetype reaches its fullest expression — a defining capability that separates you from all others.

details.effect: Sneak Attack increases to 9d6. Gain your archetype's 17th-level feature.

18.name: Ethereal Step
18.description: You can briefly step into the Ethereal Plane, becoming untouchable and passing through solid matter.

details.effect: Phase into the Ethereal Plane until end of turn. Move through creatures and objects.

19.name: Death Mark
19.description: You study a target with cold detachment, cataloguing every weakness and gap in their defenses.

details.effect: Mark creature within 60 ft for 1 min. Sneak Attack deals +3d6. Crits also stun.

20.name: Perfect Assassination
20.description: You have reduced killing to an art form of terrible elegance. One second of opportunity ends a life.

details.effect: Attack a creature you have advantage against. Max Sneak Attack damage on hit. Target makes CON save or drops to 0 HP.

21.name: Phantom Strikes
21.description: Your blade strikes through armor, around shields, past magical wards. Your attacks exist at the intersection of the physical and the impossible.

details.effect: Weapon attacks ignore resistance/immunity to physical damage. Once per turn, bonus action weapon attack without using Cunning Action.

22.name: Shadow Clone
22.description: You split your shadow into a duplicate that fights alongside you, mimicking your movements with lethal precision.

details.effect: Create a shadow duplicate within 5 ft (your AC, 1 HP, copies attacks at half damage). Lasts 1 minute.

23.name: Temporal Dodge
23.description: Your reflexes operate slightly ahead of time itself. You see attacks before they happen.

details.effect: When targeted by any attack or spell, teleport 15 ft — the attack automatically misses.

24.name: Soul Steal
24.description: When you land a killing blow, you steal a fragment of the target's life essence to empower yourself.

details.effect: When you reduce a creature to 0 HP with Sneak Attack, regain HP equal to Rogue level and gain advantage on all rolls until end of next turn.

25.name: Legend of the Shadows
25.description: You are a myth. A name whispered in fearful circles, a ghost who leaves only corpses and questions.

details.effect: Sneak Attack increases to 13d6. Permanently under Nondetection. Once per turn on hit, DC 20 CON save or drop to 0 HP.

2.name: Primeval Awareness
2.description: Expend a spell slot to sense whether aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead are present within 1 mile (6 miles in your favoured terrain) for 1 minute per slot level.

3.name: Favored Enemy
3.description: Choose a creature type. You deal +2 damage against them, have advantage on Survival checks to track them, and advantage on INT checks to recall information about them.

details.effect: +2 damage, tracking advantage vs. chosen type

4.name: Extra Attack
4.description: When you take the Attack action, you can attack twice instead of once.

5.name: Volley
5.description: As an action, make a ranged attack against every creature within a 10-ft-radius circle centred on a point within range. Make a separate attack roll for each target.

6.name: Vanish
6.description: You can use Hide as a bonus action. You also can't be tracked by nonmagical means unless you choose to leave a trail.

details.effect: Untrackable by nonmagical means

7.name: Steel Will
7.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

8.name: Explosive Arrow
8.description: Imbue one arrow with volatile energy. On a hit it deals a bonus 4d6 fire damage in a 10-ft radius (DEX save for half).

9.name: Feral Senses
9.description: You cannot be surprised. You also gain blindsight to 30 ft — you are aware of invisible creatures within that radius.

details.effect: Can't be surprised; blindsight 30 ft

10.name: Foe Slayer
10.description: Once per turn when you attack your Favored Enemy, you can add your Wisdom modifier to either the attack roll or the damage roll.

details.effect: +WIS to attack or damage vs. favoured enemy

11.name: Whirlwind Attack
11.description: You can use your action to make a melee attack against every creature within 5 feet of you, with a separate roll for each.

details.effect: Make a melee attack against every creature within 5 ft

12.name: Feral Senses (Improved)
12.description: Your primal awareness expands beyond normal perception, letting you detect invisible foes and sense movement through the earth.

details.effect: Blindsight 30 ft. Cannot be surprised. Detect hidden creatures within 30 ft through magical concealment.

13.name: Stalker's Flurry
13.description: When your attack misses, your predator's instincts kick in and you lash out with a follow-up strike.

details.effect: Once per turn, when you miss an attack, immediately make another attack against the same target.

14.name: Nature's Veil
14.description: You draw the magic of the natural world around you like a cloak, becoming one with the terrain.

details.effect: Become invisible until start of next turn. Not pierced by truesight.

15.name: Superior Hunter's Prey
15.description: Your bond with a chosen quarry becomes absolute — you sense their heartbeat and anticipate their moves.

details.effect: Extra 1d8 weapon damage vs. Favored Enemy. Always know direction/distance to Favored Enemy within 10 miles.

16.name: Guardian of the Wild
16.description: The wilderness itself fights alongside you. Roots trip your enemies, wind deflects arrows aimed at you.

details.effect: +2 AC in natural terrain. Difficult terrain doesn't affect you. Enemies in natural terrain within 30 ft have -10 ft speed.

17.name: Multishot Mastery
17.description: You nock multiple arrows simultaneously, sending a volley of deadly shafts toward multiple foes.

details.effect: Make three ranged attacks, each targeting a different creature, all with advantage.

18.name: Primal Champion of the Wild
18.description: The wilderness acknowledges you as its champion. Beasts will not attack you unless compelled by magic.

details.effect: Speak with Animals/Plants at will. Beasts are charmed by you. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs.

19.name: Titan Companion
19.description: Your animal companion evolves beyond its natural limits, growing to tremendous size with supernatural resilience.

details.effect: Companion grows to Large, gains +4 to all stats, doubles HP max, attacks are magical with +3 to hit and damage.

20.name: Foe Slayer (Improved)
20.description: You have become the ultimate hunter — your strikes against most-hated foes are almost always lethal.

details.effect: Add WIS mod to attack or damage vs. Favored Enemy. Advantage on all rolls vs. Favored Enemy.

21.name: Arrow of Doom
21.description: You conjure an arrow of pure elemental force — when it strikes, it detonates in a blast powerful enough to level fortifications.

details.damage: 20d10 force on hit; 10d10 in 20-ft radius (DEX save half)

22.name: Terrain Ascendancy
22.description: You transcend terrain entirely, moving through any environment as if it were open ground.

details.effect: Ignore difficult terrain. Gain climb and swim speed equal to movement. Walk on vertical surfaces and ceilings. Immune to environmental hazards.

23.name: Hunt the Unkillable
23.description: No quarry is beyond your reach — your senses pierce magical wards, dimensional barriers, and death itself.

details.effect: Designate a Marked Quarry. Always know their exact location regardless of distance or plane. Once per long rest, open a portal to within 60 ft of them.

24.name: Legendary Volley
24.description: You loose a single legendary shot that splits into a dozen ghostly copies, each finding a different target.

details.effect: One ranged attack roll applied to up to 12 creatures within 120 ft. Each hit takes full weapon damage + WIS mod.

25.name: Lord of the Wild
25.description: You ascend to become a living avatar of the untamed wilderness — nature bends to your will, beasts worship you as their patron.

details.effect: Immune to poison, disease, charm, fear. Cast Conjure Animals, Wall of Thorns, Earthquake 1/long rest free. Animals within 1 mile obey. Weapon attacks deal +2d8 force.

2.name: Aura of Protection
2.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft add your CHA modifier (minimum +1) to all saving throws while you are conscious.

details.effect: +CHA to all saves for you and allies

3.name: Sacred Weapon
3.description: Channel Divinity: imbue your weapon with holy light for 1 minute. It gains a bonus to attack rolls equal to your CHA modifier and sheds bright light in a 20-ft radius.

details.effect: +CHA to attacks; 20-ft bright light

4.name: Aura of Courage
4.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft cannot be frightened while you are conscious.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: When you take the Attack action, you can attack twice instead of once.

6.name: Improved Divine Smite
6.description: Whenever you hit a creature with a melee weapon, your weapon deals an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

7.name: Cleansing Touch
7.description: As an action, end one spell on yourself or on a willing creature you touch.

details.effect: Dispel a spell affecting a willing target

8.name: Aura of Warding
8.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft have resistance to damage from spells.

details.effect: Resistance to spell damage

9.name: Thunderous Smite
9.description: Your next hit deals an extra 2d6 thunder damage. The target must succeed on a STR save or be pushed 10 ft and knocked prone.

10.name: Divine Shield
10.description: You are immune to the charmed and frightened conditions. Allies within your aura radius gain +2 AC.

details.effect: Immune to charm/fear; +2 AC aura for allies

11.name: Improved Divine Smite (Greater)
11.description: Your strikes blaze with holy power so intense they sear the very souls of the undead and wicked.

details.effect: Every melee weapon hit deals an extra 1d8 radiant damage, in addition to Divine Smite.

12.name: Aura Expansion
12.description: Your holy aura radiates further, shielding a wider circle of allies with divine protection.

details.effect: All Paladin auras expand to 30-ft radius. Aura of Protection bonus increases by 1.

13.name: Radiant Strike
13.description: You channel divine wrath directly into your weapon, transforming it into a blazing instrument of punishment.

details.effect: Weapon attacks deal +2d8 radiant and ignore radiant resistance until end of turn.

14.name: Cleansing Touch
14.description: You lay hands on allies and strip away any magical affliction. No enchantment or curse can hold those you free.

details.effect: End one spell or magical effect on yourself or a willing creature you touch.

15.name: Divine Mount
15.description: You call forth a celestial steed from the upper planes that serves as your mount and companion in holy battle.

details.effect: Summon a Celestial Warhorse (max HP, magical attacks, +2d6 radiant on hits). Returns if killed, re-summon after long rest.

16.name: Holy Nimbus
16.description: You are wreathed in blinding holy light that burns evil creatures who dare approach.

details.effect: 30 ft bright light for 1 min. Enemies take 10 radiant/turn. Undead/fiends have disadvantage on attacks.

17.name: Aura of Invincibility
17.description: Your divine aura thickens to near-physical substance, granting damage resistance to those within it.

details.effect: Allies within 30 ft gain resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing.

18.name: Transcendent Smite
18.description: You pour your entire divine essence into a single catastrophic strike that tears through magical defenses.

details.save: CON or stunned until end of next turn
details.effect: Bypasses all damage resistances and immunities.

19.name: Divine Intervention
19.description: Your connection to your deity is absolute — when you call for aid, your god's hand reaches into the mortal world.

details.effect: Auto-success. Choose: resurrect all dead allies within 60 ft; 20d10 radiant to up to 5 creatures; or immunity to all damage/conditions for allies within 30 ft for 1 min.

20.name: Sanctified Fortress
20.description: You consecrate the ground around you as sacred territory, turning the battlefield into an extension of your deity's will.

details.effect: 60-ft zone moves with you for 10 min. Enemies have disadvantage on attacks/saves. Allies gain advantage on attacks and regain 5 HP/turn.

21.name: Wrath of Heaven
21.description: You become a conduit for celestial fury, calling down a pillar of divine fire that obliterates the unworthy.

details.save: DEX for half; failed saves also blinded 1 min

22.name: Divine Immunity
22.description: Your body is so thoroughly suffused with divine power that mundane harm cannot reach you.

details.effect: Immune to poison, disease, charm, and fear. Resistance to all spell damage. Cannot be reduced below 1 HP more than once per round.

23.name: Aspect of the Celestial
23.description: You temporarily take on the full radiance of a celestial being, growing wings of divine fire.

details.effect: For 1 min: wings (60-ft fly), +3d8 radiant on melee, advantage on all rolls, undead/fiends within 30 ft WIS save or frightened.

24.name: Oath Fulfilled
24.description: Your sacred oath reaches its ultimate expression. The vow you swore is no longer mere words — it is woven into the fabric of reality.

details.effect: Your Paladin auras extend to 60 ft. You are immune to radiant and necrotic damage. +2 to all saving throws.

25.name: Avatar of Divinity
25.description: You transcend the boundary between mortal champion and divine instrument, becoming a living embodiment of your deity's power.

details.effect: HP max +50. Immune to radiant/necrotic. Fiends/undead within 60 ft take 20 radiant/turn. Allies within 60 ft regain 10 HP/turn. If reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead and deal 10d10 radiant to enemies within 30 ft (1/long rest).

2.name: Danger Sense
2.description: You have an uncanny sense of danger. You have advantage on DEX saving throws against effects that you can see, such as traps and spells. You must not be blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

details.effect: Advantage on DEX saves vs. visible dangers

3.name: Frenzy
3.description: While raging you can go into a frenzy. You can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action each turn. When the rage ends you suffer one level of exhaustion.

4.name: Feral Instinct
4.description: You have advantage on initiative rolls. If you are surprised at the start of combat and are not incapacitated, you can act normally on your first turn, but only if you enter your rage before doing anything else.

details.effect: Advantage on initiative; act when surprised if you rage first

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: When you take the Attack action, you can attack twice instead of once.

6.name: Brutal Critical
6.description: When you score a critical hit, roll one additional weapon damage die when determining extra damage.

details.effect: +1 damage die on crits

7.name: Relentless Rage
7.description: While raging, if you drop to 0 HP and don't die, you can make a DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead. Each subsequent use raises the DC by 5.

details.effect: CON save DC 10+ to stay at 1 HP

8.name: Totem Resilience
8.description: While you are raging and not wearing heavy armour, you have resistance to all bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.

details.effect: Resistance to nonmagical physical damage

9.name: Indomitable Might
9.description: If your total for a STR check is less than your STR score, you can use that score in place of the total.

details.effect: STR checks cannot be lower than STR score

10.name: Primal Champion
10.description: Your physical power reaches its peak. Your STR and CON scores each increase by 4, and their maximums increase by 4.

details.effect: +4 STR, +4 CON; maximums raised by 4

11.name: Relentless Rage (Improved)
11.description: Primal fury keeps you standing through sheer defiance of mortality. Your rage refuses to let you fall while blood remains to be shed.

details.effect: If you drop to 0 HP while raging, DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each use, resets on long rest.

12.name: Persistent Rage
12.description: Once ignited, your rage burns until you choose to end it or fall unconscious. You are a tireless engine of destruction.

details.effect: Rage no longer ends early if you haven't attacked or taken damage.

13.name: Brutal Critical (Improved)
13.description: When your weapon finds a vital spot, you don't just wound — you devastate.

details.effect: Roll three additional weapon damage dice on a critical hit.

14.name: Retaliation
14.description: Pain only makes you angrier. When an enemy draws blood, your weapon lashes out before the sting registers.

details.effect: When a creature within 5 ft damages you, make a melee weapon attack against it.

15.name: Titanic Throw
15.description: You hurl a creature or massive object with enough force to shatter stone, using your enemy as a projectile.

details.effect: Grapple a creature up to one size larger. On success, hurl 30 ft dealing 4d10 bludgeoning. Creatures in landing zone take 4d10 and DC 18 STR save or prone.

16.name: Primal Fury
16.description: When your rage peaks, your strikes become a blur of savage violence that overwhelms any defense.

details.effect: While raging, enter Primal Fury for 1 min: +1 extra attack per Attack action, +1d12 damage on all attacks, disadvantage on all saves.

17.name: Unstoppable
17.description: While raging, nothing short of death can halt your charge. Paralysis, stun, and binding magic slide off you.

details.effect: While raging, immune to paralyzed/stunned/restrained by nonmagical means. CON save at end of turn to end magical versions.

18.name: Indomitable Might (Improved)
18.description: Your physical strength transcends mortal limits, accomplishing feats that would require siege engines.

details.effect: STR counts as 30 for carrying/lifting/checks/saves. Advantage on all STR checks/saves. Unarmed strikes deal 2d8 magical bludgeoning.

19.name: Greater Rage
19.description: Your rage evolves into something ancient and terrifying — a primal force that resonates with the world's first violence.

details.effect: While raging: +6 damage (up from +4), 30-ft fly speed, enemies within 10 ft DC 18 WIS save or frightened.

20.name: Primal Champion (Improved)
20.description: Your body reaches the absolute pinnacle of physical development, a monument to strength and endurance.

details.effect: STR and CON increase by 4 each (max 26). You can rage unlimited times per day.

21.name: Avatar of Destruction
21.description: You briefly become a physical manifestation of primal destruction — growing to giant size and radiating crushing force.

details.effect: For 1 min: grow to Huge, double space, triple reach, +4d12 weapon damage, creatures within 15 ft take 20 force/turn (DC 20 CON half). Resistance to all damage.

22.name: Rend the Earth
22.description: You slam the ground with such force that the earth cracks and heaves, sending devastating shockwaves in all directions.

details.save: DC 22 STR or knocked prone and stunned 1 turn; half on success
details.effect: Area becomes difficult terrain.

23.name: Warlord's Wrath
23.description: Your rage becomes infectious — a primal battle cry that ignites fury in nearby allies.

details.effect: When you rage, allies within 30 ft gain for 1 min: +3 attack/damage, resistance to physical damage, immunity to fear.

24.name: Invulnerable Hide
24.description: Years of punishment have transformed your skin into something barely flesh — it deflects blades, absorbs impacts, and shrugs off fire.

details.effect: Immune to poison/disease. Resistance to all damage while raging. AC cannot be lower than 22. Crits against you become normal hits.

25.name: Rage Incarnate
25.description: You are Rage itself given form. Your fury reshapes the world around you and can never be truly extinguished.

details.effect: Unlimited rages, rage never ends unless you choose. While raging: immune to spell damage, +3d10 melee damage. Once per long rest, 120-ft cone of 30d10 force (DC 25 STR half).

2.name: Song of Rest
2.description: During a short rest you play soothing music or tell an uplifting story. Friendly creatures who spend Hit Dice to recover HP regain an extra 1d6 HP.

details.effect: +1d6 HP when allies spend Hit Dice

3.name: Jack of All Trades
3.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check you make that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

details.effect: +half proficiency to all non-proficient checks

4.name: Countercharm
4.description: As an action, begin a performance. Until the end of your next turn, you and any friendly creature within 30 ft have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed.

5.name: Magical Secrets
5.description: You have plundered magical knowledge from a wide spectrum of disciplines. Choose two spells from any class. They count as bard spells for you.

details.effect: Learn 2 spells from any class spell list

6.name: Font of Inspiration
6.description: You regain all of your expended uses of Bardic Inspiration when you finish a short or long rest.

7.name: Cutting Words (Improved)
7.description: Use your reaction and expend a Bardic Inspiration die to subtract the rolled number from an enemy's attack roll, ability check, or damage roll.

details.effect: Subtract Inspiration die from enemy roll

8.name: Superior Inspiration
8.description: When you roll initiative and have no Bardic Inspiration uses remaining, you regain one use. Also your Bardic Inspiration die increases to a d10.

details.effect: Regain 1 use on initiative if empty; die = d10

9.name: Words of Terror
9.description: You can infuse your words with an insidious magic. Spend 1 minute speaking to a humanoid. They must succeed on a WIS save or be frightened of you for 1 hour.

10.name: Grand Maestro
10.description: Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d12. You can grant Bardic Inspiration as a bonus action, and any creature who uses one of your dice and rolls the maximum value immediately regains the die.

details.effect: Inspiration die = d12; refunds on max roll

11.name: Magical Secrets (Greater)
11.description: Your breadth of knowledge expands even further, letting you pluck spells from any tradition.

details.effect: Choose two additional spells from any class list (up to 6th level). They count as bard spells.

12.name: Song of Rest (Greater)
12.description: Your music during rest is so restorative that it knits wounds shut with almost miraculous speed.

details.effect: Song of Rest heals an additional 2d8 HP. One creature also regains a spent Hit Die.

13.name: Cutting Words (Superior)
13.description: Your verbal jabs have grown into psychic blades that cut more deeply than any sword.

details.effect: If target still succeeds after Cutting Words reduction, spend a 2nd-level slot to force a reroll (take lower).

14.name: Peerless Skill
14.description: When your talents fall just short, you reach into your repertoire and find the right flourish.

details.effect: Expend Bardic Inspiration to add the die to your own ability checks.

15.name: Mass Inspiration
15.description: Your performance crescendos into something that touches every ally simultaneously.

details.effect: Grant Bardic Inspiration dice to all friendly creatures within 60 ft who can hear you. Doesn't count against normal uses.

16.name: Irresistible Performance
16.description: Your performances are so captivating that even hostile creatures pause to listen.

details.effect: All hostile creatures within 60 ft that can hear you make a WIS save or are charmed for 1 minute.

17.name: The Legendary Tale
17.description: You speak a legend of such raw bardic power that reality begins to conform to the narrative.

details.effect: Describe an event within 120 ft — the DM determines how it manifests. Alternatively, cast any 7th-level-or-lower spell from any class free.

18.name: Symphony of Souls
18.description: Your music weaves through the spiritual essence of allies, binding them into one harmonious entity.

details.effect: For 1 min: allies within 60 ft share telepathy, advantage on attacks when near another affected ally, can absorb 5 damage for each other.

19.name: Crowd Control Maestro
19.description: A single song simultaneously ensnares an entire crowd in whatever emotional state you choose.

details.effect: Choose charmed, frightened, or stunned. All enemies within 60 ft WIS save or affected until end of next turn.

20.name: Superior Inspiration
20.description: Your Bardic Inspiration borders on the miraculous — allies transcend their limits entirely.

details.effect: Allies roll Bardic Inspiration dice twice (take higher). When you would run out of uses, regain 1.

21.name: Reality Aria
21.description: You perform a piece of such profound truth that reality itself begins to rewrite the laws of physics in the area.

details.effect: For 1 min within 120 ft, choose 3: halve/reverse gravity in 30 ft; double all healing; maximize all damage rolls; creatures can't die; advantage/disadvantage on all rolls; teleportation always succeeds.

22.name: Word of Legend
22.description: You speak a single word of such legendary bardic power that it reshapes reality in an instant.

details.effect: Choose: (a) all allies within 60 ft fully heal and cure all conditions; (b) one creature within 60 ft CON save or drop to 0 HP; (c) all creatures within 60 ft charmed 24 hours (WIS negates).

23.name: Eternal Refrain
23.description: You compose a melody that loops through time itself, letting you revisit a moment and choose differently.

details.effect: You and chosen creatures within 30 ft return to positions/states from 1 round ago (HP, conditions, positions reset). Dead creatures return at 1 HP.

24.name: Anthem of Annihilation
24.description: Your voice rises to a frequency that reality cannot bear, unleashing a wave of pure sonic destruction.

details.save: CON for half thunder; INT for half psychic
details.effect: Failed both saves: deafened and stunned 1 min. Sound heard 10 miles away.

25.name: The Living Legend
25.description: You transcend the role of performer and become a mythological force. Reality defers to your narrative authority.

details.effect: Immune to charm, fear, psychic damage. Cast any spell from any class 1/long rest free. Inspiration dice become d12s. Once per long rest, speak a Decree: describe an outcome — if physically possible within 1 hour, fate makes it happen.

2.name: Ki
2.description: You gain a pool of ki points equal to your Monk level. Spend them on: Flurry of Blows (2 bonus unarmed strikes), Patient Defense (Dodge as bonus action), or Step of the Wind (Dash or Disengage as bonus action).

3.name: Deflect Missiles
3.description: Use your reaction to deflect or catch a ranged weapon attack. The damage is reduced by 1d10 + DEX + Monk level. If reduced to 0, you catch the missile and can throw it back (1 ki) for 1d6 + DEX damage.

details.effect: Reduce ranged damage; redirect projectile for 1 ki

4.name: Slow Fall
4.description: Use your reaction to reduce any falling damage you take by an amount equal to five times your Monk level.

details.effect: Reduce fall damage by 5 × Monk level

5.name: Stunning Strike
5.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki. The creature must make a CON save or be stunned until the end of your next turn.

6.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
6.description: Your unarmed strikes are considered magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

7.name: Evasion
7.description: When subjected to a DEX save for half damage, you instead take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.

details.effect: No damage on successful DEX saves

8.name: Stillness of Mind
8.description: As an action, end the charmed or frightened condition on yourself.

9.name: Diamond Soul
9.description: You gain proficiency in all saving throws. Additionally, when you fail a saving throw, you can spend 1 ki point to reroll it.

details.effect: Proficient in all saves; reroll for 1 ki

10.name: Empty Body
10.description: Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute. During this time you have resistance to all damage except force, and you have advantage on all attack rolls.

details.effect: Invisible; resistance to all but force damage; advantage on attacks

11.name: Quivering Palm
11.description: You set up lethal vibrations in a creature's body with a single touch. Within 24 hours, you can cause it to drop to 0 HP — or deal 10d10 necrotic on a successful CON save.

12.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
12.description: You learn to touch the ki of other minds, allowing you to understand and be understood by any creature with a language.

details.effect: Comprehend and speak all languages

13.name: Diamond Soul (Improved)
13.description: Your mastery of ki grants you proficiency in all saving throws and the ability to reroll failures.

details.effect: Proficiency in all saves; spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save

14.name: Timeless Body
14.description: Your ki sustains you so that you suffer none of the frailty of old age. You can't be aged magically and no longer need food or water.

details.effect: Immune to magical aging; no need for food or water

15.name: Ki Resonance Strike
15.description: You amplify a single strike with a focused burst of ki energy that ripples through a creature's nervous system.

details.effect: Target stunned until end of your next turn

16.name: Empty Body (Improved)
16.description: Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute with resistance to all damage but force. Or spend 8 ki to cast Astral Projection without material components.

details.effect: Invisible; resistance to all damage except force

17.name: Perfect Self
17.description: When you roll for initiative and have no ki points remaining, you regain 4 ki points. Your body is never truly depleted in crisis.

details.effect: Regain 4 ki on initiative if empty

18.name: Astral Step
18.description: You slip between the material and astral planes mid-combat, teleporting and leaving a disorienting afterimage.

details.effect: Teleport; enemies within 10 ft of origin have disadvantage on attacks until start of next turn

19.name: Flurry of a Thousand Blows
19.description: Your Flurry of Blows evolves — spend 3 ki instead of 1 to make four bonus unarmed strikes instead of two.

details.effect: Four bonus unarmed strikes instead of two

20.name: Ascendant Form
20.description: You transcend mortal limits, wreathed in golden ki light. Unarmed strikes deal +2d10 radiant, speed doubles, immune to charm/fear/paralysis/stun.

details.effect: Speed doubled; immune to charmed, frightened, paralyzed, stunned

21.name: Void Palm
21.description: An evolution of Quivering Palm — plant a void resonance that disintegrates the target on a failed CON save, or deals 15d10 necrotic on success.

details.damage: 15d10 necrotic on save; disintegrated on failure

22.name: Ki Absorption
22.description: When you succeed on a save against a spell, you absorb its energy and regain ki points equal to half the spell's level.

details.effect: Regain ki equal to half spell level (min 1) on successful save vs. spell

23.name: Unbroken Stance
23.description: Your ki is so refined that your body cannot be moved against your will. You stand like a mountain.

details.effect: Immune to prone; cannot be forcibly moved or teleported; advantage on all saving throws

24.name: Thousand Strike Tempest
24.description: You move with impossible speed, striking every foe within reach simultaneously.

details.effect: One unarmed strike against each creature in range; stunned on failed CON save

25.name: Enlightened Immortal
25.description: You achieve perfect harmony of body, mind, and ki. You no longer age, are immune to disease and poison, and your ki flares to defy death itself.

details.effect: Ageless; immune to disease/poison. When reduced to 0 HP, spend 5 ki to drop to 1 HP instead and push all creatures within 20 ft back 30 ft.

2.name: Moon Shape
2.description: Your Wild Shape extends to beasts of CR 1 or higher (scaling with level). You can Wild Shape twice per short rest and maintain it for up to 2 hours.

details.effect: CR 1+ beasts; 2-hour duration

3.name: Speak with Animals
3.description: You can cast Speak with Animals at will, without expending a spell slot.

4.name: Land's Stride
4.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs you no extra movement. You can also pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed or taking damage. Plants and undergrowth have no effect on your stealth.

5.name: Call Lightning
5.description: A storm cloud forms 100 ft above you (or within a storm if one exists). As a bonus action each round, call a bolt of lightning from the cloud — creatures within 5 ft of the strike point make a DEX save or take 3d10 lightning damage.

details.usage: Action to summon; bonus action per bolt

6.name: Timeless Body
6.description: The primal magic you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year. You are also immune to disease and the poisoned condition.

details.effect: Age 10x slower; immune to disease and poison

7.name: Conjure Animals
7.description: Summon fey spirits that take the form of beasts. Choose one of: one beast of CR 2 or lower, two beasts of CR 1 or lower, four beasts of CR ½ or lower, or eight beasts of CR ¼ or lower.

8.name: Natural Recovery
8.description: Once per long rest during a short rest, you can recover expended spell slots with a combined level equal to or less than half your Druid level (rounded up).

details.effect: Recover spell slots up to half level

9.name: Shapechange
9.description: As an action, assume the form of any beast or elemental you have seen whose CR is no higher than your Druid level. You keep your mental stats and class features.

details.effect: Any beast/elemental up to CR = Druid level

10.name: Beast Spells
10.description: You can perform somatic and verbal components of Druid spells even while in Wild Shape form. You still cannot cast spells that require material components you don't possess.

details.effect: Cast spells while Wild Shaped

11.name: Elemental Wild Shape
11.description: You can expend two Wild Shape uses to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

details.effect: Transform into an elemental
details.duration: Until you drop to 0 HP or revert

12.name: Nature's Veil
12.description: As a bonus action, expend a Wild Shape use to become magically invisible until the start of your next turn.

details.effect: Invisible until start of next turn

13.name: Symbiotic Entity
13.description: When you wild shape, gain temporary HP equal to 4× your druid level and your beast attacks deal bonus poison damage.

details.effect: Gain 4× druid level temp HP; beast attacks deal +proficiency bonus poison damage

14.name: Primordial Surge
14.description: You call upon primal forces — earth splits, vines erupt, flames bloom. Creatures in a 60-ft radius must make STR saves or be restrained and take 6d8 bludgeoning.

15.name: Verdant Avatar
15.description: Assume the form of a massive plant-beast hybrid — 100 temp HP, 4d10 slam attacks, thorns deal 2d8 to melee attackers.

details.duration: 1 hour or until temp HP depleted
details.effect: 20-ft form; 100 temp HP; 4d10 slam; thorns 2d8 piercing

16.name: Nature's Ward
16.description: You are immune to poison and disease. You cannot be charmed or frightened by elementals or fey, and immune to curses.

details.effect: Immune to poison, disease, curse; immune to charm/fear from fey and elementals

17.name: Titan Wild Shape
17.description: Your Wild Shape can now take legendary beast forms — creatures up to CR equal to your druid level divided by 3. Retain concentration spells.

details.effect: Wild Shape into CR (druid level / 3); retain concentration spells

18.name: Timeless Body
18.description: Primal magic causes you to age at 1/10 the normal rate. You are immune to any magical effect that would age you.

details.effect: Age 1/10 rate; immune to magical aging

19.name: World Wrath
19.description: Call a catastrophic convergence of elemental forces. All creatures in a 60-ft radius take 12d10 elemental damage.

20.name: Archdruid
20.description: You can use Wild Shape unlimited times. Ignore verbal/somatic components in beast form and can speak while transformed.

details.effect: Unlimited Wild Shape; ignore V/S components in beast form; speak in beast form

21.name: Voice of the World
21.description: The world speaks through you. Commune with the land in a 10-mile radius, and plants/animals obey your spoken commands.

details.effect: Omniscient awareness of local terrain/creatures/events; animals and plants obey simple commands

22.name: Reincarnation Cycle
22.description: When killed, the world draws you back. Within 24 hours, your body is reborn from the earth as if by true resurrection.

details.effect: Automatic true resurrection after death

23.name: Elemental Dominion
23.description: Command elementals without a spell. Summon 1d4+1 elder elementals that obey you for 1 hour.

details.effect: Summon 1d4+1 elder elementals

24.name: World Shaper
24.description: Over 10 minutes, reshape the landscape within a 1-mile radius — raise terrain, redirect rivers, grow or wither forests.

details.effect: Permanently reshape terrain, rivers, and plant growth

25.name: One With Nature
25.description: You achieve perfect union with the living world. On natural ground outside combat, immune to all damage. In combat: resistance to all damage, blindsight 120 ft, recover one spell slot per turn (5th level or lower).

details.effect: Immune to damage on natural ground (out of combat); resistance to all in combat; blindsight 120 ft; recover one 5th-or-lower slot/turn

2.name: Font of Magic
2.description: You have a pool of sorcery points equal to your Sorcerer level. You can convert sorcery points into spell slots (2 pts = 1st, 3 = 2nd, 5 = 3rd, etc.) or break down slots into points.

3.name: Metamagic
3.description: Choose two Metamagic options. Careful Spell (protect allies from AOE), Distant Spell (double range), Empowered Spell (reroll damage dice), Quickened Spell (cast as bonus action), or Twinned Spell (target a second creature).

details.usage: Apply when casting spells; costs sorcery points

4.name: Draconic Resilience
4.description: Draconic scales manifest beneath your skin. Your AC equals 13 + your DEX modifier when you aren't wearing armour, and your HP maximum increases by 1 for every Sorcerer level you have.

details.effect: AC = 13 + DEX (no armour); +1 HP per Sorcerer level

5.name: Bend Luck
5.description: Spend 2 sorcery points to add or subtract 1d4 from any attack roll, ability check, or saving throw of a creature you can see.

details.effect: +/- 1d4 to any visible creature's roll

6.name: Elemental Affinity
6.description: When you cast a spell that deals a damage type matching your draconic ancestry (acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison), add your CHA modifier to one damage roll. Spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to that damage type for 1 hour.

details.effect: +CHA to matching element damage; resistance for 1 sp

7.name: Dragon Wings
7.description: Spend 1 sorcery point to sprout spectral draconic wings from your back. Gain a flying speed equal to your current movement speed for 1 hour.

details.effect: Fly speed = movement speed

8.name: Overchannel
8.description: Maximise all damage dice of a damaging spell of 5th level or lower. Using this feature on a spell of 2nd level or higher deals psychic damage to you (2d12 per level above 1st, cumulative per use).

details.effect: Max damage; self psychic damage for level 2+

9.name: Sorcerous Restoration
9.description: Regain 4 expended sorcery points on a short rest.

details.effect: Regain 4 sorcery points

10.name: Arcane Apotheosis
10.description: Your magic reaches its zenith. All spells you cast deal bonus damage equal to your CHA modifier. Once per long rest you may Twin any spell for free (no sorcery point cost).

details.effect: +CHA to all spell damage; free Twin Spell 1/long rest

11.name: Metamagic Mastery
11.description: You gain two additional Metamagic options and can apply two to a single spell simultaneously. Sorcery Point max increases by 4.

details.effect: Two additional Metamagic options; +4 Sorcery Points; stack two Metamagics per spell

12.name: Arcane Overload
12.description: Push a spell beyond its limits by flooding it with raw sorcerous power, maximizing all damage dice.

details.cost: Sorcery points equal to spell level
details.effect: Maximize all damage dice of the spell

13.name: Wild Surge Mastery
13.description: You harness wild magic rather than fear it. Roll twice on the Wild Magic Surge table and choose the result.

details.effect: Roll twice on Wild Magic Surge table (choose result). Tides of Chaos recharges on short rest.

14.name: Elemental Affinity Burst
14.description: Spend 3 sorcery points when casting to make your chosen element ignore resistance and immunity.

details.effect: Chosen elemental damage type ignores resistance and immunity for the turn

15.name: Arcane Explosion
15.description: Release a catastrophic pulse of raw arcane energy. All creatures within 30 ft make CON saves or take 10d6 force and are knocked prone.

details.effect: Prone on failed save

16.name: Spell Duplication
16.description: After casting a single-target spell of 5th level or lower, spend sorcery points to cast it again on a different target for free.

details.cost: Sorcery points equal to spell level
details.effect: Cast same spell again on different target at no spell slot cost

17.name: Elemental Form
17.description: Transform your body into living elemental energy for 1 minute — immune to chosen element, pass through creatures dealing 3d10 damage.

details.effect: Immunity to chosen element; pass through creatures (3d10 damage); spells converted to chosen type

18.name: Spell Torrent
18.description: After casting a spell as an action, cast a second spell of 3rd level or lower as a bonus action without a spell slot.

details.effect: Cast a 3rd-level-or-lower spell free after your action spell

19.name: Mutable Magic
19.description: When a creature succeeds on a save against your spell, spend 3 sorcery points to force a reroll (take lower).

details.effect: Force reroll on successful save against your spell, use lower result

20.name: Sorcerous Restoration
20.description: At the start of each turn in combat, regain 4 sorcery points. On a short rest, regain all sorcery points.

details.effect: Regain 4 sorcery points per turn in combat; regain all on short rest

21.name: Reality Fracture
21.description: Tear a hole in reality, releasing raw magic. All creatures within 60 ft make CON saves or take 14d10 force and are stunned for 1 minute.

details.effect: Stunned 1 min on fail

22.name: Arcane Ascension
22.description: Your sorcerous bloodline fully awakens. You gain an additional 9th-level spell slot and +2 to spell save DC permanently.

details.effect: Additional 9th-level spell slot; +2 spell save DC

23.name: Chaos Incarnate
23.description: Once per turn, trigger any wild magic surge effect you've previously experienced, targeting any creature you choose.

details.effect: Trigger any previously seen Wild Magic Surge effect of your choosing

24.name: Unstoppable Spell
24.description: Spend 7 sorcery points to make a spell completely unavoidable — bypasses immunities, can't be countered, targets have disadvantage on saves.

details.effect: Spell ignores immunities/resistances; can't be counterspelled; disadvantage on saves; can't use legendary resistance

25.name: Living Spellstorm
25.description: Your body becomes a nexus of arcane energy so intense that reality warps around you. Spells cast by others in your aura trigger wild surges. Your own spells are always empowered and maximized.

details.effect: Other casters auto-trigger Wild Surges; your spells are free Empowered and Maximized; immune to spell damage

2.name: Eldritch Invocations
2.description: You learn two Eldritch Invocations from your patron. Options: Agonizing Blast (+CHA to Eldritch Blast), Devil's Sight (see in magical darkness 120 ft), Mask of Many Faces (cast Disguise Self at will), or Misty Visions (cast Silent Image at will).

details.usage: Passive or at-will depending on choice

3.name: Pact Boon
3.description: Your patron gifts you a boon. Pact of the Blade: summon a melee weapon that uses your spell attack; Pact of the Chain: gain an improved familiar; Pact of the Tome: gain a grimoire with 3 extra cantrips from any list.

details.effect: Blade, Chain, or Tome pact

4.name: Dark One's Own Luck
4.description: When you make an ability check or saving throw, you can call on your patron for a lucky break. Add 1d10 to the result.

details.effect: +1d10 to one ability check or save

5.name: Thirsting Blade
5.description: When you use the Attack action with your pact weapon, you can attack with it twice instead of once per turn.

details.effect: Two attacks with pact weapon

6.name: Devil's Sight (Improved)
6.description: You can see normally in magical and nonmagical darkness to 120 ft. Additionally, you can see through the Invisible condition on creatures within 30 ft.

7.name: Cloak of Flies
7.description: Surround yourself with a cloud of spectral flies for 10 minutes. You gain advantage on CHA (Intimidation) checks. Creatures other than you that start their turn within 5 ft take CHA modifier poison damage.

details.effect: +Intimidation advantage; CHA poison to adjacent enemies

8.name: Shroud of Shadow
8.description: Cast the Invisibility spell at will, without expending a spell slot.

details.effect: Invisibility on self at will

9.name: Minions of Chaos
9.description: Cast Conjure Elemental once without expending a spell slot. You must finish a long rest before doing so again.

details.effect: Conjure Elemental for free

10.name: Eldritch Master
10.description: Spend 1 minute in earnest prayer or meditation to your patron to regain all your expended spell slots.

details.effect: Regain all spell slots

11.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th Level)
11.description: Your patron grants a fragment of devastating power — one 6th-level spell, cast once per long rest without a slot.

details.effect: Cast one 6th-level spell once per long rest without a slot

12.name: Eldritch Blast: Entropic Lance
12.description: Each Eldritch Blast beam deals an additional 1d8 necrotic damage. Creatures killed by it can't be resurrected by spells of 5th level or lower.

details.effect: Kills prevent resurrection by 5th-level-or-lower spells

13.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th Level)
13.description: Your patron tears a deeper rift in your mind, flooding it with a 7th-level secret.

details.effect: Cast one 7th-level spell once per long rest without a slot

14.name: Dark Patron's Favor
14.description: Your patron rewards devotion with a direct infusion of their essence. Choose: fire/poison immunity (Fiend), 1-mile telepathy (Great Old One), or Irresistible Dance at will (Archfey).

details.effect: Choose one patron gift based on your pact

15.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th Level)
15.description: Your patron pushes forbidden knowledge into your consciousness — an 8th-level spell for your arsenal.

details.effect: Cast one 8th-level spell once per long rest without a slot

16.name: Pact Ascendant
16.description: Your pact boon evolves. Familiar gains 2× warlock level HP and can use your spell slots. Pact weapon deals +1d8 force. Tome learns 3 more cantrips.

details.effect: Pact Boon upgraded: familiar stronger, weapon deadlier, or tome expanded

17.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th Level)
17.description: Your patron has given you the most devastating secret it possesses: a 9th-level spell branded into your soul.

details.effect: Cast one 9th-level spell once per long rest without a slot

18.name: Eldritch Dominion
18.description: Cast Dominate Monster without a slot or components. The target cannot use legendary resistance against it.

details.effect: Dominate Monster at will; target can't use legendary resistance

19.name: Planar Conduit
19.description: You are a living gateway between worlds. Tear open a rift to summon 1d4 creatures of CR 10 or lower from your patron's plane.

details.effect: Summon 1d4 creatures of CR 10 or lower from patron's plane

20.name: Eldritch Master (Improved)
20.description: Spend 1 minute in prayer to regain all spell slots and Mystic Arcanum. While on cooldown, regain a slot on each kill.

details.effect: Regain all spell slots and Mystic Arcanum; regain one slot per kill while on cooldown

21.name: Patron's Vessel
21.description: Your patron directly manifests through you. CHA becomes 26, spell save DC +4, creatures that fail saves are also frightened 1 hour.

details.effect: CHA 26; +4 spell save DC; failed saves also frighten for 1 hour

22.name: Dark Covenant
22.description: You bargain deeper into your pact. Gain two additional Eldritch Invocations. Limited invocations can be used twice per day.

details.effect: +2 Eldritch Invocations; limited invocations can be used twice per day

23.name: Soulbrand
23.description: Permanently mark a creature's soul with your patron's sigil. They have disadvantage on saves against your spells and you always know their location across planes.

details.effect: Permanent: disadvantage on saves vs. your spells; you sense their location across planes

24.name: Void Gaze
24.description: Lock eyes with a creature within 60 ft, forcing it to confront the void. Failed WIS save: incapacitated and 8d10 psychic per turn for 1 minute.

details.effect: Incapacitated; repeats save end of each turn

25.name: Apotheosis of the Pact
25.description: The boundary between you and your patron dissolves entirely. You gain Legendary Resistance 3/day, double Eldritch Blast beams, Mystic Arcanum (up to 8th) at will, advantage on all saves, and immunity to charm and fear.

details.effect: Legendary Resistance 3/day; double Eldritch Blast beams; Mystic Arcanum (8th and below) at will; advantage on all saves; immune to charm/fear
